title: Crafty's enhanced expeditions
description: Crafty’s Enhanced Expedition is a Minecraft modpack that adds new biomes, structures, and crafting options Perfect for adventure lovers!
body:
# Crafty’s Enhanced Expedition 
is an adventure-focused modpack for Minecraft that enhances exploration and gameplay. Key features include:

**New Biomes and Structures:** Discover unique biomes and structures in various dimensions.

**Enhanced Crafting:** Find new ores and craft powerful tools and weapons.

**Quality of Life Improvements:** Enjoy features like Crawling and 
This modpack is perfect for players who love exploration and adventure, offering a rich and varied gameplay experience.
